acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, TTD benefits after short wait period.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability: 66 2/3% wages from day 8 if over 3 days lost.** Medical 100%[4]. Light duty option. Track losses. Attorney ensures full pay.
